summary: Login functionality tested for all three portals (Admin, Sales Partner, Reseller). All logins working correctly - no intermittent failures detected. Backend API tests: 13/13 passed. Frontend UI tests: All passed.

issues: HTML hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> - cosmetic issue from dynamic rendering wrapper (not blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: Login pages don't have data-testid attributes on form elements - recommend adding for better automated testing
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All login functionality is FULLY WORKING. Tested: Admin portal login (/admin/login), Sales Partner portal login (/partner/login), Reseller portal login (/reseller/login). All use proper authentication endpoints: Admin uses /api/auth/admin/login, Resellers and Sales Partners both use /api/auth/reseller/login. Invalid credentials show proper error messages. Logout functionality works on all portals. No intermittent failures detected during testing.

admin_portal.logout: PASS - logs out and redirects to /admin/login

sales_partner_portal.role_validation: PASS - validates user has sales_partner role

reseller_portal.logout: PASS - logs out and redirects to /reseller/login
reseller_portal.multiple_attempts_test: PASS - 5/5 consecutive logins successful (no intermittent failures)

reported_issue_status.issue: User reported that login sometimes fails in reseller portal
reported_issue_status.testing_notes: Ran 5 consecutive login attempts with reseller credentials - all successful. No intermittent failures detected during backend API tests (13/13 passed) or frontend UI tests. Issue may have been resolved or may require specific conditions to reproduce.
